_comment: This file holds ALL editable text and images for the Furkid Rescue website. Nontechnical owners: edit this file (or give it to ChatGPT with CONTENT-GUIDE.xlsx) to update the site. DO NOT rename the 'keys' (the words in quotes before the colons). ONLY change the 'values' (the text after the colons).

site.tagline: A foster-based dog and cat no-kill rescue organization based in Pittsburgh, Western Pennsylvania.
site.check_mailing_address: Mail to Furkid Rescue, Pittsburgh, PA

home.hero_description: Furkid Rescue is a no-kill rescue organization in Pittsburgh, PA dedicated to saving dogs and cats from life-threatening situations and finding them the loving homes they deserve.
home.hero_image_alt: A rescued dog sitting happily with its new owner
home.featured_subtitle: These sweet pets are looking for their forever homes. Could you be their perfect match?
home.mission_image_alt: A volunteer hugging a rescued dog outdoors
mission_paragraphs: Furkid Rescue saves unwanted dogs and cats by rescuing them from life-threatening situations, getting them the medical treatment they need, and finding the best adoptive homes possible.

As a foster-based organization, every animal in our care lives in a real home with a loving foster family while they wait for adoption. This allows us to truly understand each pet's personality and find the best match.
home.cta_description: Whether you adopt, foster, volunteer, or donate — every action helps save a life. Join the Furkid Rescue community today.
home.instagram_subtitle: Stay up-to-date with all of our latest rescues and success stories.

adopt.hero_subtitle: Learn how you can adopt rescued dogs and cats from Furkid Rescue. We try to keep a complete listing of all available Furkids up-to-date here.
adopt.note_text: Not all of our available pets may be listed here. For the most up-to-date listings, follow us on

pets.name: Biscuit
pets.description: A sweet, playful boy who loves belly rubs and long walks. Great with kids and other dogs.

pets.name: Whiskers
pets.description: An affectionate lap cat who loves sunny windowsills and gentle chin scratches.

pets.name: Peanut
pets.description: A spirited little guy with a big personality. Loves to play fetch and curl up on the couch.

pets.name: Maple
pets.description: A curious kitten who loves to explore. Very social and gets along with other cats.

pets.name: Buddy
pets.description: A gentle giant who loves kids and is fully trained. Perfect family companion.

pets.name: Luna
pets.description: A calm, sweet girl who loves blankets and being cozy. Great for a quieter household.

help.hero_subtitle: It takes an entire community to do the important work accomplished by Furkid Rescue. Learn about how you can join in and help us rescue more dogs and cats!

ways_to_help.title: Foster
ways_to_help.description: Open your home temporarily to a pet in need. We provide all supplies, food, and medical care. You provide the love!

ways_to_help.title: Adopt
ways_to_help.description: Give a rescued dog or cat their forever home. Our adoption process is designed to find the perfect match for both you and your new family member.

ways_to_help.title: Donate
ways_to_help.description: Every dollar goes directly to medical care, food, supplies, and transportation for our rescued animals. We are a 501(c)(3) non-profit.

ways_to_help.title: Volunteer
ways_to_help.description: Help at adoption events, assist with transport, photograph our animals, or lend your professional skills to support the rescue.

ways_to_help.title: Share & Spread the Word
ways_to_help.description: Follow us on social media and share our posts. You never know who might be looking for their next pet — sharing saves lives!

ways_to_help.title: Wishlist & Supplies
ways_to_help.description: We always need supplies like food, litter, leashes, crates, and cleaning supplies. Check our Amazon Wishlist to see what we need most.

foster_section_paragraphs: Fostering is the backbone of our rescue. When you open your home to a foster pet, you're directly saving a life and making room for another animal to be rescued.
We cover all costs including veterinary care, food, and supplies. All you need to bring is a loving environment and some patience while your foster pet adjusts.
help.contact_banner_title: Questions? We'd Love to Hear From You
help.contact_banner_subtitle: Reach out to us anytime — we're happy to answer questions about fostering, adopting, volunteering, or donating.

about.hero_subtitle: A no-kill rescue that helps dogs and cats go from life-threatening situations to homes where they will be given the love and care they deserve.
story_paragraphs: Furkid Rescue was founded with a simple but powerful mission: to save the lives of dogs and cats who have nowhere else to turn. Based in Pittsburgh, Western Pennsylvania, we are a 501(c)(3) non-profit, foster-based rescue organization.

We rescue animals from shelters facing euthanasia, owner surrenders, and other life-threatening situations. Once in our care, every animal receives full veterinary treatment, is spayed or neutered, and is placed in a loving foster home while they await adoption.

Our foster-based model means that each pet lives in a real home environment, allowing us to provide personalized care and gain invaluable insights into their temperament — ensuring better matches with adoptive families.
about.values_subtitle: Everything we do is guided by these core principles.

values.title: Compassion First
values.description: Every animal deserves kindness. We treat each rescue with the care and dignity they deserve.

values.title: No-Kill Commitment
values.description: We never euthanize for space or time. Every animal stays in our care until they find their forever home.

values.title: Foster-Based Care
values.description: Our animals live in real homes, not shelters. This allows us to truly understand each pet's needs and personality.

values.title: Community Driven
values.description: We rely on the generosity of our community — foster families, volunteers, and donors make our work possible.

process_steps.title: Rescue
process_steps.description: We pull animals from life-threatening situations including shelters, owner surrenders, and strays.

process_steps.title: Rehabilitate
process_steps.description: Every pet receives full veterinary care — vaccinations, spay/neuter, and any needed treatment.

process_steps.title: Foster
process_steps.description: Pets are placed in loving foster homes where they can decompress and show their true personality.

process_steps.title: Adopt
process_steps.description: We carefully match each pet with their ideal forever family through our adoption process.

about.mission_cta_description: Whether you're looking to adopt, foster, volunteer, or donate, there's a place for you at Furkid Rescue.

happy_tails.hero_subtitle: Read what our adopters have to say about their experience rescuing dogs and cats from Furkid Rescue.

stories.quote: Max has completely changed our family. He was shy at first, but now he's the most loving, goofy dog. We can't imagine life without him. Thank you Furkid Rescue!
Olive is the sweetest cat I've ever had. She sleeps on my pillow every night and greets me at the door. Adopting from Furkid Rescue was the best decision I've ever made.
Charlie came to us nervous and underweight. Within weeks he was running around the backyard with our kids. He's gained 15 pounds of pure happiness!
Daisy has the biggest personality in the tiniest body. She loves car rides, belly rubs, and stealing socks. She brings so much joy to our home every single day.
I was a first-time cat owner and Furkid Rescue made the process so easy. Milo is the perfect companion — calm, affectionate, and absolutely gorgeous.
Rosie was our foster fail — we just couldn't let her go! She's brought so much love into our home. The whole family is obsessed with her.

happy_tails.share_subtitle: Did you adopt from Furkid Rescue? We'd love to hear your story and feature your furkid on our page!

donate.hero_subtitle: Furkid Rescue is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. Your donation helps us rescue more dogs and cats, provide medical treatment, and find them loving homes. Every dollar makes a difference.
donate.donation_card_subtitle: Choose an amount below or enter a custom amount. All donations are tax-deductible.
donate.paypal_note: You will be redirected to PayPal to complete your donation securely.

other_ways.label: Check:
other_ways.value: Mail to Furkid Rescue, Pittsburgh, PA

impact_items.title: Veterinary Care
impact_items.description: Covers spay/neuter, vaccinations, and a full health check for one pet.

impact_items.title: Food & Supplies
impact_items.description: Provides a month of food, litter, and basic supplies for a foster pet.

impact_items.title: Transport & Rescue
impact_items.description: Helps cover the cost of pulling a pet from a shelter and transporting them to a foster home.

impact_items.title: Emergency Medical
impact_items.description: Covers emergency surgeries, heartworm treatment, or other critical medical needs.

donate.sponsor_description: Want to help a specific pet? Visit our adopt page to see available pets and contribute directly to their care through individual fundraiser links.
donate.tax_notice_bold: Furkid Rescue is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organization.
donate.tax_notice_text: All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. You will receive a donation receipt for your records. EIN: XX-XXXXXXX
